calendar.matters:
ADDED TO UNCONTESTED CALENDAR FOR Osc For Change Of Name
Off Calendar Sep-09-2002 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Cause assigned to Dept. 218 for hearing on Name Change. Petitioner was sworn and examined. The Court ordered name changed to Gretchen Joy M. David. Decree signed in open court.
